violations.text: Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Noodles were placed hot in the refrigerator in covered containers greater than four inches deep. Covers were removed during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026

Knives were observed stored between prep units on the cookline. Utensils between uses shall be stored on a dry clean surface. Knives were cleaned and sanitized then placed on a dry clean surface during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the cookline prep units. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/21/2026
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet rooms must be self-closing. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The rice cooker handle was observed in poor repair. Equipment must be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Toilet rooms must be self closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
The hood was observed with an accumulation of debris. Hood system must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 09/10/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets on prep unit 3 were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2024
